description: The 2024 California ballot measure (Proposition 1) aimed at restructuring mental health funding by shifting billions from existing county programs toward state-run housing and treatment facilities. The debate polarized local county agencies against the Governor's statewide centralization approach.

key_events.description: Governor Newsom launches a massive advertising blitz linking Prop 1 to homelessness reduction.
County mental health directors publish formal opposition regarding funding diversion.
Late-breaking concerns regarding budget transparency narrow the margin significantly.

calibration_notes: Excellent for studying 'close-call' scenarios where initial popularity erodes due to implementation concerns.
